title: Bridge Essay: Spirituality and neurosurgery: A salutogenic current perspective.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Spirituality and neurosurgery: Asalutogenic current perspective.** — Clin Neurol Neurosurg. PMID: 40319664. DOI: 10.1016/j.clineuro.2025.108922. This systematic review aims to determine how spirituality influences prehabilitation and post-operative patient outcomes along with their coping mechanisms while undergoing Neurosurgical intervention. We have endeavoured to explore the feasibility of safe integration of this concept into Neurosurgical care provision. Aliterature search was carried out and articles were retrieved from PubMed, Science Direct and Cochrane database using specific keywords. We identified atotal of 381 studies that...

notes: Auto-acquired from PubMed/MEDLINE on 2026-07-12. Phase 16 (Visionary Cosmologies). Evaluation: Good (score=2.1)
